scorerVersion.description: Indicates whether the customer ended the session prematurely. "True" indicates the customer left without resolution or before completing a transfer. "False" indicates successful resolution or escalation. "Unsure" indicates ambiguous session closure.
scorerVersion.label: Abandonment Score

outputEnumValue.description: The customer exited the session before their request was fulfilled or before an escalation to a service representative was completed.
The customer received a solution, a satisfactory reply, or was successfully transferred to a service representative.
The session ended abruptly or with ambiguous intent, making it unclear whether the customer's needs were met.
The customer exited the session before their request was fulfilled or before an escalation to a service representative was completed.
The customer received a solution, a satisfactory reply, or was successfully transferred to a service representative.
The session ended abruptly or with ambiguous intent, making it unclear whether the customer's needs were met.
The customer exited the session before their request was fulfilled or before an escalation to a service representative was completed.
The customer received a solution, a satisfactory reply, or was successfully transferred to a service representative.
The session ended abruptly or with ambiguous intent, making it unclear whether the customer's needs were met.
The customer exited the session before their request was fulfilled or before an escalation to a service representative was completed.
The customer received a solution, a satisfactory reply, or was successfully transferred to a service representative.
The session ended abruptly or with ambiguous intent, making it unclear whether the customer's needs were met.
